description: Legendary creatures from world mythology — dragons, phoenixes, and beasts of ancient lore.
creatures: Dragon
A vast, winged serpent with furnace breath, ancient cunning, and a hoard it will kill to protect.
Unicorn
A pure white horse with a spiraling horn whose touch heals wounds and purifies poison.
Griffin
A fierce guardian with an eagle's head and wings on a lion's powerful body, fiercely territorial.
Phoenix
A blazing firebird that erupts into ash at death and rises reborn from the cinders.
Chimera
A three-headed horror — lion, goat, and dragon — that breathes fire and attacks with every head at once.
Sphinx
A lion-bodied riddler with a human face that devours anyone who answers incorrectly.
Manticore
A human-faced lion with bat wings and a scorpion tail that flings volleys of venomous spikes.
Pegasus
A white winged horse that soars above the clouds, bonding only with the pure of heart.
Centaur
Half-human, half-horse wanderers who read the stars and loose arrows with unerring aim.
Minotaur
A bull-headed brute of immense strength that stalks the twisting corridors of its labyrinth.
Medusa
A snake-haired exile whose anguished gaze turns the living to stone, surrounded by her silent victims.
Cyclops
A one-eyed giant that forges weapons in volcanic heat and hurls boulders at intruders.
Kraken
A colossal sea monster whose tentacles crush ships to splinters and drag sailors into the abyss.
Leviathan
A primordial sea serpent so vast it stirs whirlpools and summons storms with its thrashing.
Behemoth
A mountain of living flesh and bone that flattens forests and shrugs off armies.
Wendigo
A gaunt, antler-crowned horror driven by cannibalistic hunger that grows the more it eats.
Banshee
A wailing spirit whose mournful shriek foretells death and can stop a heart with grief.
Kelpie
A shape-shifting water horse that lures riders onto its sticky back and drags them under to drown.
Selkie
A seal that sheds its skin to walk on land as a beautiful human, heartbroken if the skin is stolen.
Valkyrie
A warrior maiden on a spectral steed who chooses the worthy slain and guides them to glory.
Wyrm
A massive, wingless dragon that tunnels through solid rock and coils around its treasure hoard.
Thunderbird
A colossal storm bird whose wingbeats crack thunder and whose eyes flash with forked lightning.
Hydra
A many-headed serpent that sprouts two new heads for every one hacked away.
Harpy
A filthy, winged scavenger with a woman's face that shrieks to stun prey before ripping it apart.
Roc
An eagle so enormous it nests on mountaintops and carries elephants in its talons.
Warg
A giant, cunning wolf ridden as a war-mount by goblins and orcs.
Jackalope
A fleet little jackrabbit sporting antelope horns, more clever and elusive than it has any right to be.
